name: phase-cd-preflight-memory-state-tasks
description: Phase C/D slice for organization-policy preflight integration and project-memory review_state transitions.

tasks.title: Preflight 输出组织策略摘要
tasks.acceptance: loop-execution-preflight JSON/MD 包含 organization_policy 摘要与 module 状态。
tasks.verification: execution-preflight JSON has organization_policy.result and modules.

tasks.title: 实现记忆 review_state 流转脚本
tasks.acceptance: memory-review-state 可校验 allowed_review_state 并更新 memory/index.json。
tasks.verification: memory-review-state transition outputs PASSED JSON and remote_writes=false.

tasks.title: 接入 memory-review-state 证据链
tasks.verification: collect-evidence JSON contains memory_review_state and memory_review_state_json.

tasks.title: 补充 verify-toolchain 断言
tasks.acceptance: verify-toolchain 覆盖 memory-review-state help、transition 和证据字段。

tasks.title: 生成本轮任务板与执行报告
tasks.acceptance: run 目录包含 phase-cd-preflight-memory-state-task-board 和 execution-report。
tasks.verification: task board JSON total_tasks >= 5 and execution report present.

tasks.title: 记录预估与真实耗时
tasks.acceptance: execution-time-contract 记录本轮 12-18 分钟估时和真实耗时。
